result.markdown: --- title: "Week 8: ARIMA models" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * AR, MA, ARMA and ARIMA models * Selecting model orders manually and automatically ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Sections 9.3-9.8 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 7, 8, 15 (a to c), 16 (a to c) from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [GA3](../assignments/G3.qmd) is due on Tuesday 05 May. * [IA4](../assignments/A4.qmd) is due on Friday 15 May. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 8 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 29 April.
